problem: 7 million Americans suffer from chronic non-healing wounds. 1 in 4 families has a member with a chronic wound. Untreated wounds lead to amputation (30% of untreated chronic wounds) and high mortality (75% 5-year post-amputation).
solution: Nation's leading provider of advanced wound care and hyperbaric oxygen therapy with 600+ hospital-based wound care centers. Treats 300,000+ patients annually with specialized wound expertise, advanced modalities, and Wound Science Initiative research program.
